creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:
2006/8/1, Andrew Pantyukhin <infofarmer@freebsd.org>:
> As always, it's my duty to offer portnames without
> underscores. Can you please select one from these?
>
> xpi-mrtech-local-install
> xpi-mrtech-localinstall
> xpi-mr-tech-local-install
>
Oh....sorry! ~_~
I choose "xpi-mrtech-local-install" as it's portname.
Thanks.

chinsan
